'''majozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draconism|draconism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draconism|draconism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| majozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjezheth|mæjezheth]] || [[word:mæjezhej|mæjezhej]] || [[word:mæjezhesh|mæjezhesh]] || [[word:mæjezhe|mæjezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:majojozhoth|majojozhoth]] || [[word:majojozhoj|majojozhoj]] || [[word:majojozhosh|majojozhosh]] || [[word:majojozho|majojozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:majozhoth|majozhoth]] || [[word:majozhoj|majozhoj]] || [[word:majozhosh|majozhosh]] || [[word:majozho|majozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:majofzhoth|majofzhoth]] || [[word:majofzhoj|majofzhoj]] || [[word:majofzhosh|majofzhosh]] || [[word:majofzhof|majofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majozhotho|majozhotho]] || [[word:majozhojo|majozhojo]] || [[word:majozhosho|majozhosho]] || [[word:majozhoko|majozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majozhoth|majozhoth]] || [[word:majozhoj|majozhoj]] || [[word:majozhosh|majozhosh]] || [[word:majozho|majozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majozhothol|majozhothol]] || [[word:majozhojol|majozhojol]] || [[word:majozhoshol|majozhoshol]] || [[word:majozhokol|majozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majozhothotho|majozhothotho]] || [[word:majozhojojo|majozhojojo]] || [[word:majozhoshosho|majozhoshosho]] || [[word:majozhoko|majozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majozhothon|majozhothon]] || [[word:majozhojon|majozhojon]] || [[word:majozhoshon|majozhoshon]] || [[word:majozhokon|majozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majozhothoro|majozhothoro]] || [[word:majozhojoro|majozhojoro]] || [[word:majozhoshoro|majozhoshoro]] || [[word:majozhokoro|majozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
